subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory! From the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree in the Most Exalted Paradise, this Word was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی از حفیف سدره منتهی در فردوس اعلی اینکلمه ظاهر کن لی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @literal interpretation, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
